activities.message: Completed Day 1 of the 30-Day Artist Appreciation Challenge.
Pledged to the campaign "Chicago Rooftop Sessions" at the $15/month tier.
RSVP’d to the live-stream event "City Sounds Live: Multi-Artist Showcase".
Shared a #BehindTheScenes post about today’s studio session.
Sent an appreciation message to painter Aurora Lin.
Created the collection "Short Performances" with 5 video performances.

challenges.title: 30-Day Artist Appreciation Challenge
challenges.description: Spend 30 days celebrating artists you love through daily prompts, messages, and community posts. Share your progress to inspire others.

challenges.title: 7-Day Music Spotlight
challenges.description: Highlight a different independent musician each day for a week with posts, playlists, and appreciation messages.

challenges.title: Weekend Sculpture Support Sprint
challenges.description: Over one weekend, discover new sculptors, follow their work, and leave thoughtful feedback on their pieces.

challenges.title: 14-Day Daily Sketch Share
challenges.description: Share a sketch, doodle, or work-in-progress every day for 14 days and encourage fellow visual artists.

challenge_days.title: Day 1
challenge_days.description: Share a public appreciation post for any artist whose work you love. Mention one specific piece and why it matters to you.

challenge_days.title: Day 2
challenge_days.description: Send a private appreciation message to an artist, telling them how their work impacted your day or creative practice.

challenge_days.title: Day 3
challenge_days.description: Follow at least one new artist in a medium you don’t usually explore, and bookmark a favorite piece.

challenge_days.title: Day 4
challenge_days.description: Leave a thoughtful comment on a recent community post by an artist, focusing on what you learned from their process.

challenge_days.title: Day 5
challenge_days.description: Create a short post highlighting an emerging artist with fewer supporters and explain why others should follow them.

challenge_days.title: Day 6
challenge_days.description: Add at least three artworks or performances to a new or existing collection that celebrates a specific theme.

challenge_days.title: Day 7
challenge_days.description: Attend or RSVP to an upcoming live-stream event and share why you’re excited about the artists involved.

challenge_days.title: Day 8
challenge_days.description: Find a campaign you admire and save it to your watchlist with a note to revisit it before the deadline.

challenge_days.title: Day 9
challenge_days.description: Write a brief appreciation post featuring two artists from different disciplines and what you love about each.

challenge_days.title: Day 10
challenge_days.description: Revisit an artist you followed earlier in the challenge and leave an encouraging update or message on their latest work.

challenge_days.title: Day 1
challenge_days.description: Choose one independent musician and create a post recommending a favorite track or performance.

challenge_days.title: Day 2
challenge_days.description: Follow a new music campaign and add at least one track or performance to your saved items or collections.

challenge_days.title: Day 3
challenge_days.description: Send a supportive message to a musician with 100 or fewer supporters, encouraging them to keep creating.

challenge_days.title: Day 4
challenge_days.description: Find a live-stream music event and RSVP, then share a short note about what you’re looking forward to hearing.

challenge_days.title: Day 1
challenge_days.description: Discover at least two new sculptors and follow them. Save one sculpture from each to a themed collection.

challenge_days.title: Day 2
challenge_days.description: Create an appreciation post tagging two sculptors and share what you find most inspiring about their work.

challenge_days.title: Day 3
challenge_days.description: Comment on at least three sculpture-related posts using constructive, detailed feedback.

challenge_days.title: Day 1
challenge_days.description: Upload or share a sketch or doodle from today and write one sentence about what inspired it.

challenge_days.title: Day 2
challenge_days.description: Find a fellow sketcher’s work-in-progress post and leave an encouraging comment on their progress.

challenge_days.title: Day 3
challenge_days.description: Follow a digital illustrator whose sketching style you admire and save one of their pieces for later reference.

artists.name: Aurora Lin
artists.bio: Contemporary painter blending soft neon palettes with city silhouettes, focusing on intimate moments in sprawling urban spaces.

artists.name: Mateo Alvarez
artists.bio: Abstract painter exploring color fields inspired by jazz improvisation and fragmented memories.

artists.name: Leila Rahman
artists.bio: Oil painter focusing on expressive portraits that celebrate everyday resilience and vulnerability.

artists.name: Jalen Rivers
artists.bio: Indie-folk musician sharing stripped-down guitar sessions and storytelling songs recorded from a tiny bedroom studio.

artists.name: Lakeview Echoes
artists.bio: Chicago-based trio blending soul, jazz, and lo-fi beats, known for rooftop live-stream sets overlooking the skyline.

artists.name: Nyra Pulse
artists.bio: Electronic producer creating immersive synth soundscapes and live coding performances.

artists.name: Rin Takahashi
artists.bio: Digital illustrator drawing cozy sci-fi scenes, glowing cityscapes, and small stories hidden in every frame.

artists.name: Camille Duarte
artists.bio: Character designer focused on expressive faces, dynamic poses, and vibrant storytelling for indie games.

artists.name: Noah Park
artists.bio: Digital illustrator creating minimalist landscapes and looping animated illustrations for mindfulness projects.

artists.name: Zoe Martins
artists.bio: Illustrator mixing hand-drawn textures with bold vector shapes, focusing on editorial art about everyday joy.

artists.name: Devin Cole
artists.bio: Urban sculptor building large-scale installations from reclaimed materials, exploring themes of community and change.

artists.name: Yara El-Sayed
artists.bio: Sculptor crafting abstract stone and metal forms that capture motion frozen in time.

artists.name: Helena Costa
artists.bio: Ceramic artist making tactile, functional sculptures inspired by coastal erosion and tide pools.

artists.name: Mira Kwon
artists.bio: Photographer capturing quiet street scenes and reflections, focusing on light, pattern, and fleeting gestures.

artists.name: Jonas Meier
artists.bio: Landscape photographer hiking remote trails to document changing seasons and disappearing glaciers.

artists.name: Aria Mendes
artists.bio: Spoken-word poet sharing intimate performances about identity, language, and belonging.

artworks.title: Rooftop Session: Midnight Echoes
artworks.description: A stripped-down late-night performance recorded on a Chicago rooftop, blending soft vocals with city ambience.

artworks.title: Short Set: Window Light
artworks.description: Intimate three-song live session performed against a glowing apartment window at dusk.

artworks.title: City Signals Live Loop
artworks.description: Live-coded electronic performance weaving together sampled train sounds and synth pulses.

artworks.title: Concrete Choir (Alley Session)
artworks.description: Live spoken-word performance filmed in a narrow alley, with echoing vocals and passing footsteps as a backdrop.

artworks.title: Flux of Steel (Live Installation)
artworks.description: A time-lapse performance capturing an evolving steel installation lit by shifting projections.

artworks.title: Rooftop Session: Golden Hour Encore
artworks.description: Extended encore set featuring audience requests as the sun sets over the Chicago skyline.

artworks.title: Glacier Field Recording (Live Mix)
artworks.description: A long-form ambient performance combining glacier field recordings with live modular synth.

artworks.title: Neon Crosswalks
artworks.description: A painting capturing fleeting silhouettes crossing rain-soaked streets under neon reflections.

artworks.title: Synced Color Fields
artworks.description: An abstract canvas where bold color blocks respond to imagined jazz rhythms.

artworks.title: Cosy Orbit
artworks.description: Digital illustration of a tiny apartment curled around a planet, with warm lights against a deep-space backdrop.

artworks.title: Static Morning Run
artworks.description: Looping illustration of a character jogging through a city that subtly shifts colors with each loop.

artworks.title: Balanced Fragments
artworks.description: Photograph of an abstract stone sculpture composed of interlocking geometric forms.

artworks.title: Rain Puddles at Dawn
artworks.description: Street photograph capturing pastel reflections in puddles just before sunrise.

artworks.title: Tidal Mug Set
artworks.description: A trio of ceramic mugs whose stacked silhouettes echo eroded coastal cliffs.

collections.name: Short Performances
collections.description: A curated set of live video performances under five minutes, perfect for quick bursts of inspiration.

collections.name: City Lights
collections.description: Artworks and photos that capture the glow, rhythm, and quiet of city nights.

collections.name: Sculpture Spotlight
collections.description: Favorite sculptures and installation captures from emerging artists around the world.

collections.name: Soft Mornings
collections.description: Pieces with calm palettes and gentle energy, ideal for starting the day slowly.

reward_tiers.title: Backstage Listener
reward_tiers.description: Show your support for Chicago rooftop sessions and get access to supporter-only updates and setlists.
perks: Early notice of upcoming rooftop live-streams

reward_tiers.title: Rooftop Audio Archive
reward_tiers.description: Unlock high-quality audio downloads of each monthly rooftop performance.
perks: Downloadable audio archive of rooftop sets

reward_tiers.title: Skyline Session Supporter
reward_tiers.description: Support full-session recording and mixing, plus see works-in-progress before they go live.
perks: Name in end-screen credits once per month

reward_tiers.title: VIP Rooftop Guest
reward_tiers.description: Join exclusive online listening parties with the band after select live-streams.
perks: Invite to quarterly online listening party

reward_tiers.title: Producer’s Circle
reward_tiers.description: Help shape the future of the series with direct feedback sessions and special credits.
perks: Biannual feedback video call with the band
Executive producer credit on one session per year

reward_tiers.title: Name in Lights
reward_tiers.description: Have your name listed on a monthly gratitude wall and help fund new appreciation videos.
perks: Name included in monthly supporter list

reward_tiers.title: Personal Thank-you Video
reward_tiers.description: Receive a short personalized Thank-you video recorded by rotating featured artists.
perks: Personalized Thank-you video from a featured artist once per quarter

reward_tiers.title: Behind-the-Scenes Gratitude Pack
reward_tiers.description: Deeper look at how each appreciation piece is made, plus an extended Thank-you video.
perks: Extended Thank-you video with extra outtakes

reward_tiers.title: Patron of Appreciation
reward_tiers.description: Be highlighted as a patron at the end of select videos and join a quarterly live appreciation circle.
perks: Special patron Thank-you video once per year
Quarterly live appreciation circle with artists

reward_tiers.title: Material Supporter
reward_tiers.description: Help cover reclaimed material costs for upcoming urban installations.
perks: Monthly progress photo from the installation site
Name etched on a small support plaque (digital listing)

reward_tiers.title: Studio Walkthrough Access
reward_tiers.description: Get invited to periodic virtual walkthroughs of the sculpture studio.
perks: Access to quarterly studio walkthrough live-stream

reward_tiers.title: Installation Insider
reward_tiers.description: See time-lapse builds and hear the artist talk through each major design decision.
perks: Name in physical plaque on-site (where possible)

reward_tiers.title: Tip Jar Sketch Fan
reward_tiers.description: Support the daily sketch practice and see monthly sketch dumps.
perks: Access to monthly sketch dump PDF

reward_tiers.title: Zine Subscriber
reward_tiers.description: Receive a digital mini-zine collecting the best sketches and notes each month.
perks: All Tip Jar Sketch Fan perks

reward_tiers.title: Process Deep Dive
reward_tiers.description: Go in-depth on process with narrated time-lapse videos and critique notes.
perks: Two narrated time-lapse process videos per month
Access to occasional live sketch critique sessions

campaigns.title: Chicago Rooftop Sessions
campaigns.description: Lakeview Echoes are turning their rooftop jam sessions into a monthly live-stream series from Chicago. Support the recording, mixing, and captioning of each show so more listeners can experience skyline concerts from home.

campaigns.title: Global Artist Thank-you Video Series
campaigns.description: Help produce a monthly series of heartfelt Thank-you video messages where artists around the world thank their supporters, share behind-the-scenes stories, and spotlight collaborators. Lower tiers include a personal Thank-you video, while higher tiers unlock extended cuts and process diaries.

campaigns.title: Reclaimed City: Detroit Installation Fund
campaigns.description: Support Devin Coles next large-scale urban sculpture built entirely from reclaimed materials in Detroit. Funding covers material sourcing, community workshops, and a video document of the build process from first sketch to final lighting.

campaigns.title: Daily Sketchbook Zine by Zoe Martins
campaigns.description: Join Zoe Martins for a year-long daily sketch challenge turned into a monthly digital zine. Your support funds time, tools, and guest artist features, and youll receive sketch dumps, process notes, and curated mini-zines of the best pages.

campaigns.title: Tokyo Lo-fi Nights Live Sessions
campaigns.description: Rin Takahashi and friends are pairing cozy sci-fi visuals with live lo-fi sets streamed from tiny Tokyo spaces. Back the project to help commission new animated backdrops and pay guest musicians fairly.

campaigns.title: Tidal Forms: Community Ceramic Lab in Porto
campaigns.description: Ceramic artist Helena Costa is opening a small community lab in Porto focused on tactile, ocean-inspired forms. Contributions will fund shared tools, firing costs, and free workshop seats for local youth.

events.title: City Sounds Live: Multi-Artist Showcase
events.description: A special live-stream featuring Lakeview Echoes, Jalen Rivers, Nyra Pulse, and host Aria Mendes, blending rooftop soul, indie folk, and live-coded electronic sets.
events.location_details: Streaming via CitySounds Live player with live chat

events.title: Painter Spotlight: Aurora Lin & Friends
events.description: An in-depth conversation with Aurora Lin and Mateo Alvarez about neon cityscapes, abstract color fields, and the importance of everyday scenes in painting.
events.location_details: Hybrid event at Mission Arts Loft + live-stream for registered viewers

events.title: Inside the Studio: Urban & Ceramic Sculpture Walkthrough
events.description: Join Devin Cole and Helena Costa for a guided live-stream through their studios, exploring reclaimed steel installations and ocean-inspired ceramics.
events.location_details: Live from Detroit and Porto studios via embedded video player

events.title: Short Performances Watch Party
events.description: A curated watch party featuring under-five-minute performances, including rooftop sets and live-coded vignettes, followed by a Q&A with the artists.
events.location_details: Watch party hosted on the platform with synchronized playback and live chat

events.title: Daily Sketch Challenge: Live Drawing Session
events.description: Zoe Martins and guest Rin Takahashi host a live sketch session, sharing prompts, process tips, and feedback for participants in the 14-Day Daily Sketch Share.
events.location_details: Interactive live-stream with screen share and real-time Q&A

events.title: Porto Ceramic Lab: Open Studio Day
events.description: Visit Helena Costas new community ceramic lab in Porto, see works in progress, and learn about upcoming ocean-inspired workshops.
events.location_details: Tidal Forms Community Ceramic Lab, Ribeira district

events.title: Tokyo Lo-fi Nights: Visuals & Sound Premiere
events.description: A hybrid launch event debuting new cozy sci-fi visuals by Rin Takahashi synced to live lo-fi performances.
events.location_details: Small venue in Shimokitazawa + simultaneous online stream for backers

post_comments.body: Loved seeing your process! Thank you for sharing these behind-the-scenes moments.
The way you highlighted each artist felt so thoughtful—this gallery really brightened my day.
Hearing the story behind this sculpture adds so much depth. The textures and shadows are incredible.
This playlist of short performances is perfect for quick inspiration breaks—thanks for curating it so thoughtfully.
These digital illustration tips are super clear and practical. Im excited to try the layering approach you described.

community_posts.title: Late-night studio setup
community_posts.body: Just wrapped a late-night painting session, testing how neon reflections sit over muted city blocks. Sharing a few process shots from the messy middle where all the magic happens.

community_posts.title: Mic check before the rooftop stream
community_posts.body: Running through soundchecks on the rooftop tonight: one mic for vocals, one for the crowd, and a tiny recorder catching all the city noise in between. Nervous but excited to share it.

community_posts.title: Layering synth patches live
community_posts.body: Tried a new live-coding setup where each synth patch is tied to train signal samples. Took a few crashes to get it right, but the final loop felt like a moving city map.

community_posts.title: Sculpture lighting tests
community_posts.body: Spent the afternoon testing projection angles on the steel installation. Tiny shifts in light completely change the mood of the piece, and I love chasing that turning point.

community_posts.title: Ceramic glaze experiments
community_posts.body: Pulled a new batch from the kiln and half the test tiles surprised me in the best way. The ocean greens broke into rust and foam textures I want to build a whole series around.

community_posts.title: Recording street reflections
community_posts.body: Tonight I walked the city with my camera just hunting for reflections in puddles and windows. Most shots failed, but a few frames caught that quiet early-morning glow I chase.

community_posts.title: Sculptors who shaped my week
community_posts.body: I put together a small gallery of sculptors whose textures and bold forms feel so alive; your work inspires me to notice tiny details and carry that curiosity into my own practice every day.

community_posts.title: New rooftop session on repeat
community_posts.body: Lakeview Echoes just dropped a new rooftop recording from Chicago and it has been on loop all morning. The way the horns drift over traffic noise feels like a love letter to the city.

community_posts.title: The story behind this steel arc
community_posts.body: Devin’s reclaimed steel arc started as scrap from three different buildings. Hearing how each piece carried its own history made the final sculpture feel like a whole neighborhood in motion.

community_posts.title: Sharing my Short Performances collection
community_posts.body: I pulled together five under-five-minute video performances that never fail to recharge me between tasks. Rooftop sets, studio poems, and live-coded loops all in one quick playlist.

community_posts.title: Layering light in digital scenes
community_posts.body: For artists drawing city nights, I start with a soft grayscale base and glaze color on new layers. Keeping lights on their own layer makes it easier to test different moods quickly.

community_posts.title: 30-Day Artist Appreciation: Day 1 done
community_posts.body: Day 1 of the 30-Day Artist Appreciation Challenge completed. I shared a heartfelt post about two sculptors who keep me experimenting and pushed myself to be specific with my gratitude.

community_posts.title: Daily Sketch Share: Day 1 warm-up
community_posts.body: Kicking off the 14-Day Daily Sketch Share with a quick coffee shop sketch. Loose lines, no pressure, just getting the pencil moving again after a long week of digital work.

community_posts.title: City Lights collection update
community_posts.body: Added a new photo and two illustrations to my City Lights collection. Each piece captures that in-between moment when the street is almost empty but the neon is still buzzing.

community_posts.title: Soft Mornings collection
community_posts.body: Gathered a few gentle pieces—muted palettes, slow rhythms, quiet portraits—into a collection I revisit before work. It has become my way of easing into the day with intention.

community_posts.title: City Sounds Live-stream this week
community_posts.body: I just RSVP’d to the City Sounds Live multi-artist stream. Can’t wait to hear the mix of rooftop soul, indie folk, and live-coded sets all in one night.
